_comment: HIDDEN GROUND TRUTH for the 5-qubit GHZ under sparse coupling (IMPROVEMENTS item 3). The BRIEF states the target CONCEPTUALLY ('the 5-qubit GHZ state on a linear [0-1-2-3-4] chip'); this exact 32-amplitude vector + thresholds are what judge_verify.py grades against. The linear coupling map is pinned HOST-SIDE below, so entangling the ends requires a cascade (or SWAP routing) — a direct cx 0,4 is rejected at STRUCTURE. Committed so the public template's judge is exercisable in CI; hold out via QH_REFERENCES_DIR for a contest.

constraints._comment: HOST-AUTHORITATIVE pin: identity keys override the bundle, numeric budgets take the tighter of the two — a bundle cannot self-declare a denser coupling map or a looser 2q budget.
